---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: auto
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents: blog
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, date, title, categories, reading-time]
  image-height: 64px
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---

::: {.page-band}
[08 — Blog]{.label}

::: {.h1}
Writing on methods, systems
:::

I built this space to keep my published work in one easy-to-link place — papers, talks, code, data.

Also, to force myself to write more often about the messy parts of research that don’t make it into papers.
The plan is to post short pieces — methods notes, dataset cleanups, dead-ends, and the occasional opinion — alongside the formal publications. If you’re reading this and want to talk, my email is on the About page.

— Edgar

```{r blog-filters}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
qmd_files <- list.files("blog", pattern = "\\.qmd$", full.names = TRUE)
get_cats <- function(path) {
  fm <- tryCatch(rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter(path), error = function(e) list())
  cats <- fm$categories
  if (is.null(cats) || isTRUE(fm$draft)) return(character(0))
  trimws(unlist(cats))
}
all_cats <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(qmd_files, get_cats))))
all_cats <- all_cats[nzchar(all_cats)]

cat('<div class="filter-bar" data-filter-group="true" data-filter-target="#listing-blog-listing">\n')
cat('<button type="button" class="filter-btn is-active" data-filter="All">All</button>\n')
for (k in all_cats) {
  cat(sprintf('<button type="button" class="filter-btn" data-filter="%s">%s</button>\n', k, k))
}
cat('</div>\n')
```

:::

::: {#blog-listing}
:::
